menu.custom_screen_info.contents:
kulupu ante li lawa e lipu ni. kulupu Mojang Studios en kulupu Microsoft li lawa ala e lipu ni.

o kepeken sona! sina tawa lipu la, o awen. o pana ala e sona jan sina e sona pi kama sina.

sina ken ala musi tan lipu ni la, sina ken weka tan ma kulupu kepeken nena lon anpa.
menu.custom_screen_info.title: sona pi lipu pi ken ante
menu.custom_screen_info.tooltip: lipu ni li ken ante. o kama sona namako lon ni.
menu.quick_actions.title: pali pi tenpo lili
multiplayer.codeOfConduct.check: mi o toki ala tawa sina lon nasin lawa ni pi ma kulupu
multiplayer.codeOfConduct.title: nasin lawa pi ma kulupu
multiplayer.confirm_command.parse_errors:
sina alasa pali e toki wawa ni: ona li sona ala anu ike.
sina wile ala wile?
toki wawa: %s
multiplayer.confirm_command.permissions_:
sina alasa pali e toki wawa ni: ona li wile e ken wawa.
ni li ken ike e musi sina.
sina wile ala wile?
toki wawa: %s
multiplayer.confirm_command.signature_re: sina alasa pali e toki wawa ni: ona li toki kepeken nimi sina. ona li wile lon lipu toki. toki wawa: %s
multiplayer.confirm_command.suggest_comm: pali sama lon lipu sitelen pi toki
multiplayer.confirm_command.title: o lon e pali pi toki wawa
multiplayer.disconnect.code_of_conduct: ma kulupu li wile e ni: sina toki e "pona" tawa nasin lawa pi ma kulupu
multiplayer.disconnect.configuration_err: mi ante la pakala pi sona ala li lon
narration.slider.usage.focused.keyboard_: o luka e nena pi linja sin la o kama ante e nanpa linja
options.allowCursorChanges.tooltip: Allows the mouse cursor to change shape when over certain UI elements.
options.chat.drafts: o awen e toki pi pana ala
options.chat.drafts.tooltip: sina open toki li pini ala li pana ala la, mi awen e ona. sina ken kepeken lon tenpo sin toki.
options.invertMouseX: o ante e nasin lukin pi nasin X
options.invertMouseY: o ante e nasin lukin pi nasin Y
options.music_frequency: kalama sin o lon tenpo pi mute seme
options.music_frequency.tooltip: mi ante e mute pi tenpo ni: kalama sin li kama lon.
options.showNowPlayingToast: mi pana e nimi pi kalama musi
options.showNowPlayingToast.tooltip: ni li pana e nimi pi kalama musi lon, lon open kalama. nimi sama li lon tenpo ante pi open ala lon ma ni: sina pini pi tenpo lili e musi.
options.showSubtitles.tooltip: o ken e sitelen kalama lon musi.
options.sprintWindow.tooltip: sina wile tawa wawa kepeken nena pi tawa sinpin lon tenpo tu la tenpo ni li ken lon insa pi kepeken tu ni.
pack.incompatible.confirm.unknown: ni li pakala, anu ni li wile e nanpa ante pi musi Manka. ken la ona li nasa ike.
pack.incompatible.unknown: (ni li pakala, anu ni li ken ala lon musi ni)

mco.configure.world.name.validation.whit: Must not start or end with whitespace. It will be trimmed.
options.chunkFade.tooltip: How long in seconds chunks should fade in when they're first rendered, if at all.
options.cutoutLeaves.tooltip: Allows you to see through gaps in leaves. Disabling improves performance.
options.graphics.preset.tooltip: Sets "Quality & Performance" settings to reasonable defaults corresponding to the desired quality.
options.improvedTransparency.tooltip:
An experimental approach that uses screen shaders for drawing weather, clouds, and particles behind translucent blocks and water.
This will impact GPU performance.
options.maxAnisotropy.tooltip: Each level significantly improves how smooth textures look, but impacts performance and significantly impacts video memory usage. Requires Texture Filtering to be set to Anisotropic.
options.musicToast: mi pana e nimi pi kalama musi
options.musicToast.never.tooltip: mi pana ala e nimi pi kalama musi
options.musicToast.pauseMenu.tooltip: mi pana e nimi pi kalama musi lon lipu pi lape musi.
options.musicToast.pauseMenuAndToast: lon tenpo pi lape musi lon tenpo pi open kalama
options.musicToast.pauseMenuAndToast.too: mi pana e nimi pi kalama musi lon tenpo pi open kalama. nimi sama li lon lipu pi lape musi
options.textureFiltering.anisotropic.too: A hardware based filtering method, but impacts performance and significantly impacts video memory usage. May not be supported on all hardware.
options.textureFiltering.none.tooltip: Textures are displayed without any filtering. Blocks may look blurry when viewed at an angle.
options.textureFiltering.rgss.tooltip:
(Rotated Grid Super Sampling)
A shader based filtering method that improves texture quality with a moderate performance impact.
options.vignette.tooltip: This is a subtle texture over the game screen used for reducing brightness towards the edges of the screen and warning about the world border.
options.weatherRadius.tooltip: Radius of the area where rain and snow effects are visible. Very low performance impact.
